text_excerpt: News | Dame Karen Bradley MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Karen News Campaigns Contact Gradbach, Heaton, Meerbrook, Thorncliffe, Swythamley & Upper Hulme Residents Survey In Parliament News Happy Staffordshire Day! Friday, 1 May, 2026 Wishing everyone in Staffordshire Moorlands a very happy Staffordshire Day! Local News The Year of the Moorlands Village - Month 12, May 1st May 2026 I am delighted to announce that I will be featuring the lovely villages/hamlets of Gradbach, Heaton, Meerbrook, Thorncliffe, Swythamley & Upper Hulme for the... Local News The Year of the Moorlands Village - Lask Edge 29th April 2026 Acre Farm Cattery and White Chimnies holiday cottages - both in the lovely village of Lask Edge. Local News Bringing Staffordshire to Parliament 29th April 2026 1st May is Staffordshire Day and on Wednesday, we brought Staffordshire to Parliament! Local News The Year of the Moorlands Village - Biddulph Moor 27th April 2026 Christ Church is a beautiful church serving the community of Biddulph Moor. Local News The Year of the Moorlands Village - Biddulph Moor 23rd April 2026 Biddulph Moor is a fantastic place for country walks and the Village Green makes a great starting or resting point. Local News The Year of the Moorlands Village - Biddulph Moor 22nd April 2026 Biddulph Moor Village Hall is a great place for events, activities and get‑togethers of all kinds. Local News The Year of the Moorlands Village - Rushton Spencer 21st April 2026 The Knot Inn in Rushton Spencer, that I featured in my 'A Year of Reasons to Visit the Moorlands' initiative, is another of our fantastic, local pubs. Local News The Year of the Moorlands Village - Knypersley 20th April 2026 St John’s Church in the village of Knypersley has long been a place of worship and community life, hosting regular services and events. Local News The Year of the Moorlands Village - Month 11 17th April 2026 If you live in Biddulph Moor, Knypersley, Lask Edge or Rushton Spencer, please do take a few minutes to fill in my The Year of the Moorlands Village residents...
